lessons.title: Plan and implement advanced security for compute
lessons.content_md:
This module is designed to provide administrators with the knowledge and skills needed to plan and implement advanced security measures for Azure compute resources, safeguarding applications and data against evolving security threats.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/advanced-security-compute/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and implement advanced security for compute

lessons.title: Plan and implement security for storage
lessons.content_md:
This module is designed to provide administrators with the knowledge and skills required to plan and implement comprehensive security measures for Azure storage resources, safeguarding data integrity, confidentiality, and availability.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/security-storage/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and implement security for storage

lessons.title: Plan and implement security for Azure SQL Database and Azure SQL Managed Instance
lessons.content_md:
This module is designed to empower administrators with the knowledge and skills needed to plan and implement robust security measures for Azure SQL Database and Azure SQL Managed Instance, ensuring data protection and regulatory compliance.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/security-azure-sql-database-azure-sql-managed-instance/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Plan and implement security for Azure SQL Database and Azure SQL Managed Instance

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Protect compute, storage, and databases
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Protect compute, storage, and databases**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
